UnitAbilities.Title: Grand Strategist
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of the Storm
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the end of your Command phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 12" of this model: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Master Chronomancer
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: The Stars Are Right
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, triple the Attacks and Strength characteristics of this model’s Staff of Tomorrow and every successful Wound roll made for this model’s attacks scores a Critical Wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Illuminor
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is within 3" of one or more other friendly Necrons units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mechanical Augmentation (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Necrons Battleline unit is within 3" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1, and each time an attack targets that unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Atomic Energy Manipulator
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of the Fight phase, if this model destroyed one of more models this phase, until the end of the battle, add 3" to the range of its Mechanical Augmentation ability (to a maximum of 12").

UnitAbilities.Title: Ancient Collector
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, at the end of your Command phase, if that unit is within range of an objective marker you control, it remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at start or end of any turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Surrogate Hosts
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you can select one other friendly Necrons Infantry Character model on the battlefield (excluding Skorpekh Lord or Epic Hero models). The selected model is destroyed (ignoring any rules that are triggered when a model is destroyed) and this model is put in its place, with all of its wounds remaining (if the selected model was leading a unit, this model now attaches to that unit as its Leader).

UnitAbilities.Title: Adaptive Strategy
UnitAbilities.Text: This model's unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

UnitAbilities.Title: Engrammatic Logic
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Necrons unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

UnitAbilities.Title: United In Destruction
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Crimson Harvest
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Nanoscarab Amulet
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Resurrection Orb
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, while the bearer is leading a unit, at the end of any phase, it can resurrect that unit if it is on the battlefield. When you do, that unit's Reanimation Protocols are activated, reanimating D6 wounds rather than D3 when doing so. You cannot resurrect more than one unit per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Destroyer Cult
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Driven by Hatred
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Resurrection Orb
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the end of any phase, select one friendly Necrons Infantry or Necrons Mounted unit within 6" of the bearer and resurrect that unit. When you do, that unit’s Reanimation Protocols are activated, reanimating D6 wounds rather than D3 when doing so. You cannot resurrect more than one unit per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Carrier Wave (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Necrons unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Advanced Quantum Shielding
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack targets this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than this model’s Toughness characteristic, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: My Will Be Done
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when it is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Implacable Resilience
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from that attack’s Damage characteristic.

UnitAbilities.Title: My Will Be Done
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when it is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Translocation Shroud
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model's unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of the models in that unit. In addition, each time a model in that unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, until that move is finished, it can move horizontally through models and terrain features (it cannot finish a move on top of another model or its base).

UnitAbilities.Title: Rites of Reanimation
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Technomancer
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one friendly Necrons model within 6" of the bearer. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Nightmare Shroud (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 6" of this model, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the test when it does so.

UnitAbilities.Title: Harbinger of Despair
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, at the start of your Command, Movement, Shooting, Charge or Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of this model. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the test when it does so.

UnitAbilities.Title: Timesplinter Mantle
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Chronometron
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 5" as if it were your Movement phase. If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

UnitAbilities.Title: Harbinger of Destruction
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Living Lightning
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model (excluding units with the Lone Operative ability that are not part of an Attached unit and are not within 12" of this model) and roll four D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Their Number is Legion
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate, you can re-roll the dice to see how many wounds are reanimated.

UnitAbilities.Title: Implacable Eradication
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Nanoscarab Reanimation Beam (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Necrons unit is within 3" of this model, each time that unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate, that unit reanimates an additional D3 wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Inescapable Death
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase. In addition, each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 2+.

UnitAbilities.Title: Multi-threat Eliminator
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit makes a ranged attack that targets a friendly Necrons unit within 3" of a model with this ability, after that enemy unit has shot, one model with this ability that is within 3" of that target can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

UnitAbilities.Title: Dispersion Shield
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Guardian Protocols
UnitAbilities.Text: While a Noble model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, if strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hyperspace Hunters
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, in the Reinforcements step of your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit is set up on the battlefield from Reserves within 18" of and visible to this unit, this unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must only target that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

UnitAbilities.Title: Flesh Hunger
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if the target of that attack is Below Half-strength, a successful Hit roll scores a Critical Hit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bound Creation
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit is in the same unit as a Cryptek model, that Cryptek model has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Systematic Vigour
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a Cryptothrall model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and it is then removed from play.

LeaderInfo.Description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a Cryptek Infantry model (a unit cannot have more than one Cryptothralls unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

UnitAbilities.Title: Plasmacyte
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle for each Plasmacyte this unit has, when this unit is selected to fight, you can use this ability. If you do, until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer’s Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place the relevant number of Plasmacyte tokens next to the unit, removing one each time this unit uses this ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Whirling Onslaught
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If this unit made a Charge move this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Targeting Relay
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

UnitAbilities.Title: Grand Illusion
UnitAbilities.Text: If your army includes this model, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Necrons units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Infos.Title: ENSLAVED STAR GOD
Infos.Text: This model cannot be your Warlord.

UnitAbilities.Title: Transdimensional Displacement
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model is selected to Advance, you can remove it from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Necrodermis
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Infos.Title: ENSLAVED STAR GOD
Infos.Text: This model cannot be your Warlord.

Infos.Title: C’TAN SHARD
Infos.Text: This model cannot be given enhancements.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fabricator Claw Array (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Necrons Vehicle unit is within 6" of the bearer, that unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Gloom Prism (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Necrons unit is within 6" of the bearer, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Canoptek Swarm
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, select one friendly Canoptek Scarab Swarm unit within 6" of this unit. One destroyed model is returned to that Canoptek Scarab Swarm unit for each Spyder model in this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Self-destruction
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the Fight phase, if this unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can select one model in this unit to destroy. If you do, do not roll for that model’s Deadly Demise ability; instead, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of that model and roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if that unit is a Vehicle. On a 2-5, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Chittering Swarm
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of this unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit (to a minimum of 1). In addition, while this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly Cryptek models, the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit is 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Plasmacyte
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle for each Plasmacyte this unit has, when this unit is selected to fight, you can use this ability. If you do, until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer’s Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place the relevant number of Plasmacyte tokens next to the unit, removing one each time this unit uses this ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tunnelling Horrors
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Nebuloscope
UnitAbilities.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Shadowloom
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has the Stealth ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Shieldvanes
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a Save characteristic of 3+ and a Move characteristic of 8".

UnitAbilities.Title: Evasion Engrams
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

UnitAbilities.Title: Relentless Combatants
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit, and this unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

UnitAbilities.Title: Wraith Form
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Malevolent Arcing
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, each time you select a target for this model’s twin tesla destructor, roll one D6 for the target unit and one D6 for every other enemy unit within 3" of the target unit. On a 5+, the unit being rolled for is struck by arcing energies; after resolving all of this model’s attacks against the target unit, each unit struck by arcing energies suffers D3 mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Overwhelming Obliteration
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Movement phase, if this model Remains Stationary, until the end of the turn, its doomsday cannon has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hard-wired for Destruction
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets the closest eligible enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is within range of an objective marker your opponent controls, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Optimised for Slaughter
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack with an enmitic exterminator that targets a unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles), re-roll a Wound roll of 1. Each time a model in this unit makes an attack with a gauss destructor that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sentinel Construct
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Repair Barge
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, just after an enemy unit finishes making its attacks, if one or more friendly Necron Warriors units within 3" of this model lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks, this model can use this ability. If it does, select one of those Necron Warriors units; that unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate. The same Necron Warriors unit cannot be selected for this ability more than once per turn.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 10 Necron Warrior models and 1 Necrons Infantry Character model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Atavistic Instigation
UnitAbilities.Text:
Each time this model targets an enemy unit with its heavy death ray, your opponent must declare if that unit will stand firm or duck for cover:
	▪ If it stands firm, when resolving ranged attacks against that unit this phase, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
	▪ If it ducks for cover, until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Quantum Invader
UnitAbilities.Text: This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

UnitAbilities.Title: Translocation Beams
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of the Fight phase, if there are no models currently embarked within this Transport, you can select one friendly Necrons Infantry unit wholly within 6" of this Transport. Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this Transport. That unit can embark within this Transport in a turn it disembarked from this Transport.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 1 Necrons Infantry unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Gravitic Pulse
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your opponent’s Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model. Until the end of the turn, half the Move characteristic of models in that unit and half the Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit. In addition, if that unit can Fly, until the start of your next Movement phase, roll one D6 each time that unit ends any type of move on a 4+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-8 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Powers of the C’tan
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, when this model is selected to shoot, first select up to two different C’tan Powers weapons (see left). Until the end of the phase, this model is equipped with those weapon in addition to its other weapons (this model cannot make attacks with any other C’tan Powers weapons you did not select in this way this phase).

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-8 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Eternity Gate
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Movement phase (excluding the first battle round), you can select one friendly Necrons Infantry unit that is either in strategic reserves or on the battlefield (if you select a unit on the battlefield, remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into strategic reserves). That unit can make an ingress move, and must be set up wholly within 6" of this unit and not engaged with any enemy units. That unit cannot make a charge move this turn.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Voice of the Triarch
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the battle round, select one Triarch ability (see left). Until the start of the next battle round, this unit has that ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: The Silent King
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Necrons unit is within 6" of this unit’s Szarekh model, improve that unit's Leadership characteristic by 1.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this unit’s Szarekh model has 1-6 wounds remaining, halve the Attacks characteristic of that model’s weapons, and each time this unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: SUPREME COMMANDER
Infos.Text: If this unit is in your army, it must be your Warlord.

Infos.Title: TRIARCHAL MENHIRS
Infos.Text:
If this unit’s Szarekh model is destroyed, all of this unit’s 
remaining Triarchal Menhir models are also destroyed.

Sections.Title: Phaeron of the Stars (Aura)
Sections.Text: While a friendly Necrons unit (excluding Monster units) is within 6" of this unit’s Szarekh model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

Sections.Title: Phaeron of the Blades (Aura)
Sections.Text: While a friendly Necrons unit (excluding Monster units) is within 6" of this unit’s Szarekh model, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit and each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

Sections.Title: Relentless March (Aura)
Sections.Text: While a friendly Necrons unit is within 6" of this unit’s Szarekh model, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Reanimation Nodes (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Necrons Infantry unit is within 6” of this Fortification, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Ancient Cover
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fortification
UnitAbilities.Text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
	▪ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
	▪ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

Infos.Title: DEPLOYMENT
Infos.Text: When this unit is first set up on the battlefield, its models do not have to be set up in Unit Coherency. Instead, each model must be set up wholly within 12" of one other model from its unit. From that point on, each model in this unit is treated as a separate unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Terrifying Monstrosity
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Titanic Walker
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding Titanic models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-9 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-9 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Harassment Swarm (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) is within 3" of this unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Accelerator Mandible
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the Fight phase, select one friendly Canoptek unit within 3" of the bearer’s unit. Until the end of the phase, improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Nanoscarab Projector
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, when a friendly Necrons unit within 3" of the bearer activates its Reanimation Protocols, the bearer can use this ability. If it does, that unit reanimates 1 additional wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Weapon Sentinels
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 12", you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic; the Hit roll; the Wound roll.

LeaderInfo.Description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a Cryptek model (a unit cannot have more than one Tomb Crawlers unit joined to it and cannot have both a Tomb Crawlers and a Cryptothralls unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tectonic Reverberations
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model. Until the start of your next Movement phase that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

UnitAbilities.Title: Obelisk Node Control
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is within range of an objective marker you control, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

Infos.Title: VANGUARD PROTOCOLS
Infos.Text: If this model is attached to a Canoptek Macrocytes unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, this model has the Scouts 8" ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Nullstone Field Generator (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Necrons unit is within 6" of the bearer, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Protective Disciples
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is within 3" of one or more other friendly Destroyer Cult units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Infectious Murder-madness (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Necrons unit (excluding Monster and Titanic units) is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, if that model has the Destroyer Cult keyword or that enemy unit is the closest eligible target, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Prophet of Destruction
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model destroys an enemy unit, select one other friendly Destroyer Cult unit within 9" of it. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

Rule.Restrictions: This detachment has the DYNASTY tag and cannot be taken with another DYNASTY detachment.
Rule.Title: HYPERMOTILITY PROTOCOLS
Rule.Text:
▪ Friendly Immortals/Necron Warriors units’ ranged attacks have [ASSAULT].
▪ When a friendly Immortals/Necron Warriors unit is selected to make an advance move, that move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to start an action.

Stratagems.Name: Dominance Protocols
Stratagems.When: Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Immortals unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit has +1 OC until the end of the turn.

Stratagems.Name: Will of the Conqueror
Stratagems.When: End of your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Immortals/Necron Warriors unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one objective your unit is controlling. That objective is secured.

Stratagems.Name: Nanosaturation
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit that targeted a friendly Immortals/Necron Warriors unit has shot.
Stratagems.Target: That Immortals/Necron Warriors unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit shoots using snap shooting, but while doing so your unit can only target that enemy unit.

Enhancements.Name: Enlivened Sentinels
Enhancements.Description: Necron Warriors unit only. This unit has Scouts 5".

Enhancements.Name: Tools of Dominion
Enhancements.Description: Immortals unit only. This unit’s ranged attacks have [RAPID FIRE 1].

AddedAbilities.Title: HYPERMOTILITY PROTOCOLS
AddedAbilities.Text: When this unit is selected to make an advance move, that move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to start an action.

Rule.Title: TRANSDIMENSIONAL DEPLOYMENT
Rule.Text:
▪ Friendly Tomb Blades units have Deep Strike.
▪ When a friendly Tomb Blades unit is selected to shoot, if that unit made an ingress move this turn, that unit’s ranged attacks have +1 to hit rolls.

Stratagems.Name: Omnilocked Strafing
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Necrons Mounted unit is selected to make a fall-back move.
Stratagems.Target: That Necrons Mounted unit.
Stratagems.Effect: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.

Stratagems.Name: Swift as Death
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of a friendly unengaged Necrons Mounted unit.
Stratagems.Target: That Necrons Mounted unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".

Stratagems.Name: Evasive Protocols
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Necrons Mounted unit.
Stratagems.Target: That Necrons Mounted unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Ranged attacks that target your unit with a S greater than your unit’s T have -1 to wound rolls.

Enhancements.Name: Recursive Reanimation
Enhancements.Description: Tomb Blades unit only. When this unit activates its Reanimation Protocols, +1 to the roll.

Enhancements.Name: Deepening Madness
Enhancements.Description: Destroyer Cult Mounted unit only. This unit’s ranged attacks have [ASSAULT].

AddedAbilities.Title: TRANSDIMENSIONAL DEPLOYMENT
AddedAbilities.Text: When this unit is selected to shoot, if that unit made an ingress move this turn, that unit’s ranged attacks have +1 to hit rolls.

Rule.Restrictions: This detachment has the HYPERCRYPT tag and cannot be taken with another HYPERCRYPT detachment.
Rule.Title: EMPOWERED ENGINES
Rule.Text: Friendly Necrons Titanic Fly units have +6" M.

Stratagems.Name: Subsurface Quantumweave
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Necrons Titanic Fly unit.
Stratagems.Target: That Necrons Titanic Fly unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Attacks that target your unit have -1 AP until that enemy unit has attacked.

Stratagems.Name: Particle Pulse
Stratagems.When: Start of your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Necrons Titanic Fly unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. That enemy unit has +3" detection range.

Stratagems.Name: Cosmic Storm
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Obelisk/Tesseract Vault unit is selected to shoot.
Stratagems.Target: That Obelisk/Tesseract Vault unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s Tesla Sphere weapons have +1 AP.

Enhancements.Name: Prelocational Optimiser
Enhancements.Description:
Necrons model only. When this unit is selected to shoot, if this unit was set up using a Monolith’s Eternity Gate ability this turn, this unit’s ranged attacks have:
	▪ [LETHAL HITS].
	▪ Or: [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

Enhancements.Name: Mortality Shroud (Aura)
Enhancements.Description: Obelisk unit only. In your opponent’s Battle-shock step, if an enemy unit within 8" of this unit is below starting strength, that enemy unit makes a battle-shock roll.

AddedAbilities.Title: EMPOWERED ENGINES
AddedAbilities.Text: Friendly Necrons Titanic Fly units have +6" M.

Rule.Title: ANNIHILATION PROTOCOL
Rule.Text:
Each time a Destroyer Cult or Flayed Ones unit from your army declares a charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll. If one or more targets of that charge are Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Charge roll as well.

Each time a Destroyer Cult unit from your army makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, add 1 to the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack.

Each time a Destroyer Cult unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, improve the Armour Penetration of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Masks of Death
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Destroyer Cult or Flayed Ones unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: The Spoor of Frailty
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Destroyer Cult or Flayed Ones unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model from your unit makes an attack that targets a unit below Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If the target is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

Stratagems.Name: Murderous Reanimation
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Destroyer Cult or Flayed Ones unit from your army that has just destroyed an enemy unit, or just caused an enemy unit that was not Below Half-strength to become Below Half-strength.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit's Reanimation Protocols activate.

Stratagems.Name: Pitiless Hunters
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Destroyer Cult or Flayed Ones unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6", instead of up to 3".

Stratagems.Name: Blood-Fuelled Cruelty
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: One Destroyer Cult or Flayed Ones unit from your army that started the phase within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds. Your unit can then make a Normal move, but must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit.

Stratagems.Name: Insanity's Ire
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
Stratagems.Target: One Destroyer Cult or Flayed Ones unit from your army that has one or more of its models destroyed by the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move, but must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit.

Enhancements.Name: Eternal Madness
Enhancements.Description: Necrons model only. In the fight phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit is destoryed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed mode from play; it can fight after the attacking model's unit has finished making its attacks, and i then removed from play.

Enhancements.Name: Ingrained Superiority
Enhancements.Description: Necrons model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes and attack, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Enhancements.Name: Soulless Reaper
Enhancements.Description: Destroyer Cult model only. Each time an enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit is selected to Fall Back, roll one D6: on a 3+, that unit cannot Fall Back this phase and must Remain Stationary.

Enhancements.Name: Eldritch Nightmare
Enhancements.Description: Destroyer Cult model only. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test.

Rule.Title: COMMAND PROTOCOLS
Rule.Text: While a Necrons Character model is leading this unit, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Protocol of the Eternal Revenant
Stratagems.When: Any phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons Infantry Character model from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destoryed.
Stratagems.Effect: At the end of the phase, set your model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with half of its starting number of wounds remaining.
Stratagems.Restrictions: Each model can only be targeted with this Stratagem once per battle.

Stratagems.Name: Protocol of the Undying Legions
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit activates its Reanimation Protocols and reanimates D3 wounds (or D3+1 wounds if a Necrons Character is leading your unit).

Stratagems.Name: Protocol of the Hungry Void
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit. In addition, if a Necrons Character is leading your unit, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1 (this is not cumulative with any other modifiers that improve Armour Penetration).

Stratagems.Name: Protocol of the Sudden Storm
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability. In addition, if a Necrons Character is leading your unit, until the end of the phase, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for your unit.

Stratagems.Name: Protocol of the Conquering Tyrant
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within half range, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If a Necrons Character is leading your unit, until the end of the phase, you can re-roll the Hit roll for that attack instead.

Stratagems.Name: Protocol of the Vengeful Stars
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a Necrons unit from your army.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons Character unit from your army that was within 6" of that Necrons unit when it was destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: After that attacking unit has resolved its attacks, your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

Enhancements.Name: Veil of Darkness
Enhancements.Description: Necrons model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove that unit from the battlefield. Then, in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set up that unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

Enhancements.Name: Nether-realm Casket
Enhancements.Description: Necrons model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

Enhancements.Name: Phasal Subjugator (Aura)
Enhancements.Description: Necrons model only. While a friendly Necrons unit (excluding Character units) is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: Enaegic Dermal Bond
Enhancements.Description: Necrons model only. The bearers has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

Rule.Title: POWER MATRIX
Rule.Text:
Certain area of the battlefield are considered to be within your army's Power Matrix as follows:

	▪ Your deployment zone is always within your army's Power Matrix.
	▪ At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within No Mans's Land, unitl the end of that phase, No Man's Land is within your army's Power Matrix.
	▪ At the start of any phase if you control at least half of the objective markers within your opponent's deployment zone, until the end of that phase, your opponent's deployment zone is within your army's Power Matrix.

Each time a model in a Cryptek or Canoptek unit from your army makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If such a unit is wholly within your army's Power Matrix, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

Stratagems.Name: Curse of the Cryptek
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or at the start the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
Stratagems.Target: One Cryptek model from your army that was destroyed by one of the attacking unit's attacks. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly Canoptek model makes an attack that targets the attacking unit, ad 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Cynosure of Eradication
Stratagems.When: The start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Cryptek or Canoptek unit from your army that is wholly within your army's Power Matrix.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by Cryptek or Canoptek models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Solar Pulse
Stratagems.When: Start of your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Cryptek model from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one objective marker within 18" of your Cryptek model. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by friendly Necrons models have the [IGNORES COVER] ability while targeting units within range of that objective marker.

Stratagems.Name: Reactive Subroutines
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: One Canoptek unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

Stratagems.Name: Countertemporal Shift
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Canoptek unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

Stratagems.Name: Suboptimal Facade
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
Stratagems.Target: One Canoptek unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge and is wholly within your army's Power Matrix.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit's Reanimation Protocols activate.

Enhancements.Name: Dimensional Sanctum
Enhancements.Description: Cryptek model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Infiltrators ability.

Enhancements.Name: Hyperphasic Fulcrum
Enhancements.Description: Cryptek model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, if that unit is wholly within your army's Power Matrix, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

Enhancements.Name: Autodivinator
Enhancements.Description: Cryptek model only. Each time your opponent gains a CP as the result of an ability, roll one D6: on a 2+, you also gain 1CP.

Enhancements.Name: Metalodermal Tesla Weave
Enhancements.Description: Cryptek model only. Once per phase, when a enemy unit selects the bearer's unit as a target of a charge, roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

Rule.Title: HYPERPHASING
Rule.Text:
At the end of your opponent’s turn, you can select a number of Necrons units from your army (excluding units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units). The maximum number of units you can select depends on the battle size, as follows:
▪ Incursion: Up to 1 unit
▪ Strike Force: Up to 2 units
▪ Onslaught: Up to 3 units

Once you have made your selections, remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

Stratagems.Name: Hyperphasic Recall
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons Infantry unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit's attacks and one friendly Monolith model.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove your Infantry unit from the battlefield and then set it back up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 6" of your Monolith model and not within engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

Stratagems.Name: Quantum Deflection
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons Vehicle unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

Stratagems.Name: Reanimation Crypts
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: Your Necrons Warlord.
Stratagems.Effect: For each of your Necrons units in Reserves, that Reserves unit's Reanimation Protocols activate.

Stratagems.Name: Cosmic Precision
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons unit from your army (excluding Monster units) that is arriving using the Deep Strike or Hyperphasing abilities this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.
Stratagems.Restrictions: A unit targeted with the Stratagem is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.

Stratagems.Name: Dimensional Corridor
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons unit from your army that was set up on the battlefield this turn using the Eternitty Gate abilty of a Monolith model that started the turn on the battlefield.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit is eligible to charge this phase.

Stratagems.Name: Entropic Damping
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Titanic model from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks and is within 18" of the attacking unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in the attacking unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Dimensional Overseer
Enhancements.Description: Necrons model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield or in Strategic Reserves, add one to the number of units from your army that you can select for the Hyperphasing rule.

Enhancements.Name: Arisen Tyrant
Enhancements.Description: Necrons model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the bearer's unit was setup on the battlefield this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

Enhancements.Name: Hyperspatial Transfer Node
Enhancements.Description: Necrons model only. Each time the bearer's unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer's unit.

Enhancements.Name: Osteoclave Fulcrum
Enhancements.Description: Necrons model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Deep Strike ability.

Rule.Title: WORTHY FOES
Rule.Text: In your Command phase, select one enemy unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a Noble, Lychguard or Triarch unit from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Your Time is Nigh
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after you opponent's Warlord is destroyed.
Stratagems.Target: Your Necrons Warlord
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the battle, each time an enemy unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, subtract 1 from the result.

Stratagems.Name: Enslaved Artifice
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons unit from your army (excluding Titanic units) that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ score a Critical Hit.

Stratagems.Name: Nanoassembly Protocols
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons Vehicle unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Stratagems.Name: Sentinels of Eternity
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Lychguard or Triarch Praetorians unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model's unit has finished making attacks, and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Suffer No Rival
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Lychguard or Triarch unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Territorial Obsession
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Lychguard or Triarch unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit. If your unit has the Vehicle keyword, add 3 to the Objective Control characteristic instead.

Enhancements.Name: Honourable Combatant
Enhancements.Description: Overlord model only. Each time the bearer's unit destorys an enemy Character unit, your opponent loses 1 CP if they have any.

Enhancements.Name: Unflinching Will
Enhancements.Description: Overlord model only. The bearer's melee weapons have the [PRECISION] and [ANTI-INFANTRY 5+] abilities.

Enhancements.Name: Warrior Noble
Enhancements.Description: Overlord model only. Each time a melee attack targets the bearer's unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: Eternal Conqueror
Enhancements.Description: Overlord model only. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objetive marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

Rule.Title: RELENTLESS ONSLAUGHT
Rule.Text: Each time a Necrons model (excluding Monster models) from your army makes an attack that targets a unit within range of one or more objective markers, add 1 to the Hit roll. In addition, ranged weapons equipped by Necrons Vehicle and Necrons Mounted models (excluding Titanic models) from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Merciless Reclamation
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons unit (excluding Monster and Titanic units) from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if the target of that attack is within range of one or more objective markers, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Unyielding Forms
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons Vehicle or Necrons Mounted unit (excluding Titanic units) from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets a model in your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Chronoshift
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons Vehicle or Necrons Mounted unit (excluding Titanic units) from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

Stratagems.Name: Dimensional Tunnel
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons Vehicle or Necrons Mounted unit (excluding Titanic units) from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit can move horizontally through models and terrain features.

Stratagems.Name: Endless Servitude
Stratagems.When: End of your Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons unit (excluding Monster and Titanic units) from your army that is within range of one or more objective markers you control.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.

Stratagems.Name: Reactive Reposition
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons unit from your army (excluding Monster and Titanic units) that was the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

Enhancements.Name: Dread Majesty (Aura)
Enhancements.Description: Overlord or Catacomb Command Barge model only. While a friendly Necrons unit (excluding Monster and Titanic units) is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

Enhancements.Name: Miniaturised Nebuloscope
Enhancements.Description: Necrons model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Demanding Leader
Enhancements.Description: Necrons model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly Necrons Vehicle or Necrons Mounted unit (excluding Titanic units) within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Enhancements.Name: Chrono-impedance Fields
Enhancements.Description: Necrons model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly Necrons Vehicle or Necrons Mounted unit (excluding Titanic units) within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in that unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Rule.Title: TECHNOSORCEROUS AUGMENTATIONS
Rule.Text:
▪ Ranged weapons equipped by Cryptek models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability.
▪ In your Shooting phase, each time a Cryptek unit from your army is selected to shoot, select one of the following abilities: [ANTI-INFANTRY 3+], [ANTI-MOUNTED 4+], [ASSAULT], [HEAVY], [IGNORES COVER]. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have that ability.

Stratagems.Name: Molecular Targeting
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristic; the Hit roll. If your unit has the Cryptek keyword, you can also ignore any or all modifiers to the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Microscarab Swarm
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Cryptek Infantry unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: If your unit has the Necron Warriors keyword, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 5+ invulnerable save. If your unit has the Immortals keyword, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

Stratagems.Name: Animus Curse
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
Stratagems.Target: One Cryptek model from your army that was destroyed by one of the attacking unit’s attacks. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly Necrons model makes an attack that targets the attacking unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Synergistic Empowerment
Stratagems.When: Start of your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Cryptek unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one friendly Necrons model (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within 12" of a Cryptek model in your unit. Until the end of the phase, that friendly Necrons model has the Cryptek keyword.

Stratagems.Name: Untapped Power
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Cryptek unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit is selected to shoot, when selecting an ability for the Techno-sorcerous Augmentations Detachment Rule, you can select one additional ability from those available.

Stratagems.Name: Potentiality Syphon
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons unit from your army within range of one or more objective markers.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate. If it is a Cryptek unit, it reanimates an additional 1 wound.

Enhancements.Name: Quantum Abacus
Enhancements.Description: Necrons model only. Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 if it is within range of one or more objectives: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

Enhancements.Name: Atomic Disintegrators
Enhancements.Description: Cryptek model only. In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, when selecting an ability for the Technosorcerous Augmentations Detachment rule, you can also select from the following abilities: [ANTI-MONSTER 5+], [ANTI-VEHICLE 5+].

Enhancements.Name: Gauntlet Of Compression
Enhancements.Description: Necrons model only. Add 6" to the Range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit.

Enhancements.Name: Gravitic Bolas
Enhancements.Description: Cryptek model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks (excluding Titanic units); until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

AddedAbilities.Title: Technosorcerous Augmentations
AddedAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, each time this unit is selected to shoot, select one of the following abilities: [ANTI-INFANTRY 3+], [ANTI-MOUNTED 4+], [ASSAULT], [HEAVY], [IGNORES COVER]. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have that ability.

Rule.Title: COLD FERVOUR
Rule.Text:
▪ Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by Destroyer Cult models from your army.
▪ The first time each turn that a Destroyer Cult unit from your army makes attacks that destroy a unit or cause it to become Below Half-strength, after that unit has finished resolving its attacks, until the end of the turn, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by friendly Necrons models (excluding Destroyer Cult, Monster and Titanic models).

Stratagems.Name: Methodical Murder
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Image of Death
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Destroyer Cult unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Mortis Protocols
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after the first time a Destroyer Cult unit from your army destroys an enemy unit this turn.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Necrons unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within 9" of that Destroyer Cult unit.
Stratagems.Effect: The friendly unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.

Stratagems.Name: Driven to Butchery
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Destroyer Cult unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per turn.

Stratagems.Name: Spreading Madness
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, if one or more targets of that charge are within Engagement Range of one or more friendly units, add 2 to the Charge roll.

Stratagems.Name: Unnatural Aggression
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of those enemy units if it were your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit now declares a charge that only targets one or more of those enemy units, and you resolve that charge. Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

Enhancements.Name: Destroyer Ankh
Enhancements.Description: Catacomb Command Barge or Overlord model only. The bearer has the Destroyer Cult keyword. Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit and add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

Enhancements.Name: Murdermind
Enhancements.Description: Cryptek model only. The bearer has the Destroyer Cult keyword and during the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a Destroyer Cult unit (excluding Character units). If you do, the bearer’s unit cannot contain any models without the Destroyer Cult keyword. Add 3" to the Move characteristic of the bearer.

Enhancements.Name: Mark Of The Nekrosor
Enhancements.Description: Destroyer Cult model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: Cursed Circlet
Enhancements.Description: Destroyer Cult model only. Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if any models from the bearer’s unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, the bearer’s unit can make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: the bearer’s unit can be moved a number of inches up to the result, but the bearer’s unit must finish that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding Aircraft). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. A unit cannot make a Surge move while it is Battle-shocked.

Rule.Restrictions: When mustering your army, each Necrons Monster unit from your army has the relevant Necrodermal Binding ability shown on the right, and you must increase the points cost of each of those units by the amount shown in the Munitorum Field Manual. If this causes your army to exceed the points limit for the battle you are playing, you cannot include that unit in your army.
Rule.Title: COSMIC DISTORTION
Rule.Text:
Necrons Monster units from your army have the following ability:
Distortion Fields (Aura): While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, it is unravelling. While an enemy unit is unravelling, each time an attack targets that unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
At the start of each phase, for each Necrons Monster unit from your army, that unit can suffer 3 mortal wounds. If it does, until the end of the phase, the range of that unit’s Distortion Fields Aura ability is increased to 9".
Designer’s Note: If your army contains more than one Transcendent C’tan unit, each of those units must take the Reletavistic Tether ability.

Stratagems.Name: Disharmonisation Cascade
Stratagems.Category: PANTHEON OF WOE - EPIC DEED STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after a Necrons Monster model from your army is destroyed, before making its Deadly Demise roll.
Stratagems.Target: That Necrons Monster model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your model’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 3+ instead of on a 6.

Stratagems.Name: Molecular Erosion
Stratagems.Category: PANTHEON OF WOE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons Monster unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one unravelling enemy unit visible to your unit. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. When doing so, subtract 1 from the result. If that test is failed, that enemy unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle round.

Stratagems.Name: Mass Transmogrification
Stratagems.Category: PANTHEON OF WOE - EPIC DEED STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a Necrons Monster unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Necrons unit (excluding Monsters) within 6" of that Monster unit.
Stratagems.Effect: If that enemy unit was unravelling at the start of the phase, your friendly unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per turn.

Stratagems.Name: Entrophasic Aura Targeting
Stratagems.Category: PANTHEON OF WOE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons unit (excluding Monsters) from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is unravelling, re-roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.

Stratagems.Name: Chronodistortion
Stratagems.Category: PANTHEON OF WOE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 if the attacking unit is unravelling: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Phase Melding
Stratagems.Category: PANTHEON OF WOE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an unravelling enemy unit is selected to Fall Back.
Stratagems.Target: One Necrons unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: When that enemy unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

AffectedUnits: C’TAN SHARD OF THE VOID DRAGON

AddedAbilities.Title: Distortion Fields (Aura)
AddedAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, it is unravelling. While an enemy unit is unravelling, each time an attack targets that unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. At the start of each phase, for each Necrons Monster unit from your army, that unit can suffer 3 mortal wounds. If it does, until the end of the phase, the range of that unit’s Distortion Fields Aura ability is increased to 9".

AddedInfoSections.Title: SINGULARITY MATRIX
AddedInfoSections.Text: Lord of Deceit (Aura): Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

AddedInfoSections.Title: QUANTUM GOAD
AddedInfoSections.Text: This model is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced

AffectedUnits: C’TAN SHARD OF THE VOID DRAGON

AddedInfoSections.Title: ANIMUS DAMPER
AddedInfoSections.Text: Once per turn, at the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy Vehicle unit visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and, if that Leadership test was failed, subtract 1 from the Wound roll as well.

AddedInfoSections.Title: RELETAVISTIC TETHER
AddedInfoSections.Text: In your turn, each time this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike or Transdimensional Displacement abilities, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units. When doing so, if this model is set up within 9" of one or more enemy units, until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

ArmyRules.Title: REANIMATION PROTOCOLS
ArmyRules.Text:
If your Army Faction is Necrons, at the end of your Command phase, each unit from your army with this ability activates its Reanimation Protocols and reanimates D3 wounds. Each time such a unit reanimates a wound: 
	▪ If that unit contains one or more models with fewer than their starting number of wounds remaining, select one of those models; that model regains one lost wound. 
	▪ If all models in that unit have their starting number of wounds, but that unit is not at its Starting Strength, one destroyed model is returned to that unit with one wound remaining. 

Once such a unit is at its Starting Strength and all of its models have their starting number of wounds, nothing further happens. 

Example: A unit of Lokhust Destroyers (which have a Wounds characteristic of 3) activates its Reanimation Protocols. The unit had a Starting Strength of 3, but currently contains 2 models, and one of those models has lost 1 wound. A is rolled to see how many wounds are reanimated. The first of these reanimated wounds restores the wounded Lokhust Destroyer back to 3 wounds. The second of these reanimated wounds returns the destroyed Lokhust Destroyer to the battlefield with 1 wound remaining. The third of these reanimated wounds restores one of the remaining lost wounds to the same Lokhust Destroyer that was just returned. The unit now contains 3 models, two of which have 3 wounds remaining and one of which has 2 wounds remaining.
